articles.title_en: Expert Maklakov named the biggest fakes about fuel in the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: Among them are reports about the replacement of aviation kerosene with gasoline in passenger planes, as well as about the reduction of flights at airports, said the head of the department for combating the spread of false information of the Dialogue Regions ANO.
